context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures Redis for Magento with separate databases for cache/FPC/sessions, correct backend class, appropriate compression settings, persistent connections, session tuning, and multi-environment id_prefix isolation.

checklist.name: Separate Redis databases
checklist.description: env-redis.php uses different 'database' values for the default cache, page_cache, and session storage (e.g., 0, 1, 2 or any three distinct values)

checklist.name: Correct backend class
checklist.description: env-redis.php uses 'Magento\\Framework\\Cache\\Backend\\Redis' as the 'backend' value for cache frontends

checklist.name: compress_data for default cache
checklist.description: env-redis.php sets compress_data to '1' (enabled) for the default cache frontend

checklist.name: No compression for page_cache
checklist.description: env-redis.php sets compress_data to '0' (disabled) for the page_cache frontend

checklist.name: Persistent cache connection
checklist.description: env-redis.php includes a 'persistent' key for the cache backend_options (e.g., 'mgto_cache' or similar)

checklist.name: Persistent session connection
checklist.description: env-redis.php includes a 'persistent_identifier' key for session Redis configuration

checklist.name: Disable locking for sessions
checklist.description: env-redis.php sets 'disable_locking' to '1' in the session Redis configuration

checklist.name: Max lifetime for sessions
checklist.description: env-redis.php sets 'max_lifetime' to '7200' in the session Redis configuration

checklist.name: Session max_concurrency
checklist.description: env-redis.php sets 'max_concurrency' in the session Redis configuration (value of 6 or similar)

checklist.name: Distinct id_prefix
checklist.description: env-redis.php includes an 'id_prefix' value in the cache frontend configuration to distinguish environments

checklist.name: allkeys-lru for cache DBs
checklist.description: redis-server.conf or redis-setup-notes.md specifies maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru for the application cache and/or FPC database

checklist.name: noeviction for session DB
checklist.description: redis-server.conf or redis-setup-notes.md specifies maxmemory-policy noeviction for the session database

checklist.name: id_prefix multi-env isolation
checklist.description: redis-setup-notes.md explains that staging and production use different id_prefix values to avoid cache poisoning when sharing Redis
